summary: Verified bug fix for Finance Center licensee daily projection balance drop. Backend API returns correct sequential balances with no drops (528 projections checked). Frontend fix at line 1113 uses p.start_value directly from backend instead of recalculating with runningBalance. All 9 backend tests passed.

test_results.backend_no_balance_drops: PASSED - No balance drops found in 528 consecutive projections
test_results.backend_balance_increases_when_traded: PASSED - Balance increases by daily_profit when manager_traded=true
test_results.backend_balance_stays_same_when_not_trad: PASSED - Balance carries forward when manager_traded=false
test_results.backend_quarterly_compounding: PASSED - Lot size fixed at 3.48 for Q1 2026 (64 days)
test_results.frontend_daily_projection_table: VERIFIED - Shows correct Balance Before values from backend
test_results.frontend_manager_traded_column: VERIFIED - Toggle switches visible for each day

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. The key change was in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx line 1113 where 'const balanceBefore = runningBalance' was changed to 'const balanceBefore = p.start_value'. This ensures the frontend uses the backend's pre-calculated balance values (with quarterly compounding) instead of recalculating them client-side. Backend endpoint /api/admin/licenses/{id}/projections returns correct sequential balances with no drops. The test licensee (Ryan TEST) has effective_start_date of 2025-01-15 with starting_amount of $2,611.10.
